title: Shaping Futures: Healing Bodies, Minds, and Communities
about: The 20th Sakyadhita International Conference travels to Indonesia — bringing together Buddhist women from across the world's traditions for five days of teachings, scholarship, and friendship. Hosted by the Indonesian Buddhist Association, the program will feature plenary lectures, panel discussions, meditation sessions, cultural performances, and opportunities to connect with practitioners and scholars from over 30 countries. We look forward to welcoming you to Indonesia in June 2027.
notice: The Academic Program Committee is now receiving paper proposals for the 20th Sakyadhita International Conference 2027. Paper proposals should be submitted by July 30, 2026.

callForPapers.title: Sakyadhita invites you to our 20th International Conference on Buddhist Women
callForPapers.subtitle: Celebrating the 40th anniversary of Sakyadhita
callForPapers.intro: The Academic Program Committee is now receiving paper proposals for the 20th Sakyadhita International Conference on Buddhist Women in Magelang, Indonesia, June 19–26, 2027. The 2027 conference theme: Shaping Futures: Healing Bodies, Minds, and Communities.
topics: Compassion and Buddhist Approaches to Mental and Emotional Well-being
Women's Leadership and Community Care in Buddhist Traditions
Mindfulness in Healthcare: Bridging Spirituality and Medicine
Environmental Stewardship and Social Responsibility in Buddhist Practice
Spirituality and Trauma Recovery: Addressing Personal and Collective Suffering
Buddhism and Gender Justice: Building Inclusive Communities
Digital Technology and Spiritual Practice in Buddhist Communities
Buddhist Perspectives on Resilience and Social Challenges
Social Inclusion and Gender Justice: Sakyadhita's Role in Shaping a More Equitable Future
Youth, Buddhist Education, and Social Responsibility

deadlines.label: Proposals due
deadlines.detail: Paper proposals of approximately 250 words, submitted through the proposal form.

deadlines.label: Acceptance notice
deadlines.detail: Notification of acceptance is sent to all applicants.

deadlines.label: Final papers due
deadlines.detail: 2,000 words maximum for 10-minute papers, to be edited and translated into various languages.

callForPapers.originality: All proposals and papers must be the original, unpublished work of the presenters.
callForPapers.allowedHeading: Using AI as an assistive tool
allowed: You may use AI tools to assist in the editing of text
You may use AI tools to edit or enhance images, as long as the images are your own original work
callForPapers.notAllowedHeading: Using AI as a generative tool
notAllowed: You may not submit any AI-generated content, including text, translations, or images
You may not use AI tools to generate or create images or other illustrative materials
callForPapers.disclosure: At the time of proposal submission, authors must fully indicate their use of all AI tools.
callForPapers.welcome: Sakyadhita encourages diversity and creativity. We welcome proposals from presenters of any gender, nationality, or status. We look forward to receiving your proposal!
callForPapers.note: Please note that this will be an in-person conference, and participants must register and plan accordingly. Paper presenters are responsible for their own conference-related travel and participation fees.
